name: vivi-agent-loop
description: Operate a local Vivi browser comment loop while coding with Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Run a live Vivi browser comment loop while coding.
interface.longDescription: Vivi Agent Loop teaches Codex to watch Vivi comments, reply safely, coordinate multiple threads, and delegate noisy inbox listening when useful.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the Vivi agent loop for this session.
